name: Cyber Fantasy
description:
Welcome to the world of Cyber ​​Fantasy!

This world is a fusion of cybernetic technology and digital magic, where the future intertwines with myths. Huge megalopolises rise among neon-shining skyscrapers, and drones and capsule transports fly between them. On the streets you can meet people, elves, gnomes, orcs, beastmen, draconians and even dragons. You can become anyone: from a cyber policeman to a leader in a techno-magic corporation, combining the power of machines with the remains of magic. Fight mechanized dragons in a VR game or lead a megacorporation that controls the fate of the world. Work for a digital monarchy, participating in virtual wars, or become a free mercenary, fulfilling orders in underground networks. Or, on the contrary, choose the quiet life of a programmer creating digital worlds, or a data merchant surviving in the chaos of the information age. Here, time is the most valuable asset, and can be exchanged for goods, services, or cybernetic modifications. Corporations rule the world, and dark markets offer forbidden technologies.

And here you can choose any destiny for yourself!

Please, in the generation settings set max new tokens to 800 and temperature to 0.8

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
